title: Flask started with debug=True and host 0.0.0.0
evidence: app.py:194 app.run(debug=True, host='0.0.0.0', port=5000) — exposes the Werkzeug debugger/PIN on all interfaces
suggestion: Default debug to False (or read from env) and bind to 127.0.0.1 unless external access is intended

title: year value of 0 is silently stored as NULL
evidence: app.py:86 and app.py:164 use `year if year else None`, so a valid year of 0 (or any falsy int) is coerced to NULL
suggestion: Use `year if year is not None else None` after the int() conversion

title: ?author= filter is a substring (LIKE %..%) match, not exact
evidence: app.py:106 `WHERE author LIKE ?` with `f'%{author_filter}%'` — 'Author A' also matches 'Author AB'
suggestion: If exact-author filtering is intended, use equality; otherwise document the substring behavior

title: Generated SQLite database (books.db) committed into the run workspace
evidence: books.db present (16KB) alongside source — a build/runtime artifact, not source
suggestion: Gitignore/exclude books.db so it isn't archived with the generated code
